src/main/java/com/example/coworking/Cowo.general_idea: Configure Spring Data Web to serialize Page objects via DTOs to avoid exposing internal implementation details.

pom.xml.general_idea: Renamed the project artifact, name, and description from 'coworking' to 'workSpace'.
Updated the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Added SonarQube organization property for static analysis integration.
Removed the spring-boot-starter-data-jpa dependency (likely to be re-added or managed differently).
Removed explicit version from Lombok and marked it as optional, relying on parent BOM or default resolution.
Added spring-boot-starter-aop dependency for aspect-oriented programming support.
Added springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui dependency for API documentation generation.
Re-added spring-boot-starter-data-jpa dependency for data persistence support.
Added spring-boot-starter-validation dependency for bean validation support.
Added explicit jackson-databind dependency with a specific version.
Added maven-checkstyle-plugin to enforce code style standards during the build.

.gitignore.general_idea: Added patterns to ignore log files and directories in version control.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Renamed the Spring Boot application identifier from 'coworking' to 'workSpace'.
Configured the JDBC URL to connect to a local PostgreSQL database named 'coworkingsdb'.
Configured the database password to be sourced from the DB_PASSWORD environment variable.
Enabled automatic Hibernate schema updates on startup.
Explicitly specified the PostgreSQL JDBC driver class.
Enabled logging of executed SQL statements for debugging purposes.
Configured Hibernate to format logged SQL statements for better readability.
Disabled the Open Session In View pattern to prevent lazy loading issues in the web layer.
